title: rosa × schottiana var. dollineriana
intro: Rosa × schottiana var. dollineriana, also known as Rosa × schottiana Dollineriana, is a hybrid rose plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Rosa × schottiana var. dollineriana has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
